Est. 2006 · Kolkata & Bangalore, India
Stitched Marvels of Yield — leather, without compromise.
MANUFACTURING PARTNER · LEATHER BAGS & SMALL GOODS

Heritage craft,
held to a modern standard.

SMY Creation was founded in 2006 by a master craftsman, built to serve as a manufacturing partner to corporate houses and domestic brands working in leather bags and small goods. Two decades on, that founding discipline is still the operating principle: hard work, heritage skill, and a genuine regard for what leather is capable of when it isn't rushed.

Markets change faster than materials do. We've stayed close to that shift — in design language, in technology, in what a modern brand expects — without letting any of it dilute the hand-skill or the honesty of the hide. Every piece is tested to international benchmarks, priced with intent, and produced the ethical, sustainable way.

We call what we make Stitched Marvels of Yield: leather goods conceived, developed and manufactured without tampering with the material's natural character. Every business occupies its own space in the market — our work is understanding that space well enough to manufacture for it.

— Two decades of leather craft, 2006 to present
Sector at a glance

India's leather sector runs on scale, skill and compliance — SMY is built on all three.

1 / 4 of the world's cattle population is India's, feeding a raw-material base few other manufacturing hubs can match.
3.0Bn square feet of leather produced annually across the country, at consistent, exacting quality.
Top 2 position among the world's largest producers of leather goods, backed by heritage craft labour and cluster-scale allied industry.

What we do

From first sketch to bulk despatch — one partner across the entire production line.

01

Design & Development

Co-create with our team to bring a design concept to life — current on material, colour and style trends, with technical consultation, 2D/3D pattern-making, die development and embellishment sourcing built into the process.

02

Sample Production & Prototype

Our artisans turn an idea into a display-ready prototype — feel, fit and quality checked at every stage. Low-MOQ and small-batch sample runs are available, including our in-house stock range for private-label launch.

03

Quantity & Bulk Production

Sourced through LWG-certified tanneries, with full visibility into the production process regardless of order size — rigorous quality control, competitive pricing, reliable timelines, and command of the regulatory and chemical-compliance landscape.

04

Corporate Bulk Orders

Personalised office essentials, leather accessories and gifting for corporate houses — a considered way to mark occasions and product launches for clients and employees alike.

Global standards

Certifications & compliance

SMY Creation operates in line with internationally recognised standards for quality management, ethical manufacturing, and responsible sourcing.

Quality Management Systems

A structured, consistent approach to quality across every stage of manufacturing — recognised across Europe, North America, Asia and the Middle East.

Social Accountability Standard

Safe working conditions, fair labour practices and responsible employment standards, recognised by brands across Europe, the US, Canada and Australia.

Global Recycled Standard

Verifies genuine use of recycled materials and a responsible, traceable supply chain — a common requirement for European and US brand partners.

Leather Working Group

Environmentally responsible leather processing and tannery standards, recognised by leather goods and fashion brands worldwide.

Ethical Supply Chain Standard

Transparent, standardised reporting on labour, health and safety, environmental practice and business ethics — built to simplify buyer audits and due diligence.

Facility Sustainability Measurement

A standardised way of measuring and improving environmental and social performance on the floor, supporting benchmarking and continuous improvement.

From the line

Made on our floor.

A cross-section of finished goods — structured totes, chain-strap crossbodies and woven leather, produced start to finish under our own roof.

Our commitment

Transparency with every tannery, sustainability in every hide, and a finished product that never tampers with what leather naturally is.
